name_en: New Prada 2107 Hot, commanding, versatile, timeless. Handbag, crossbody. A year-round essential that suits any style. Market-exclusive craftsmanship, perfect original box calf leather. Your wardrobe cannot be without this strong styling tool! Dimensions: 30-22-14cm
